idea-plugin.name: Fish Toucher
idea-plugin.description:
Fish Toucher is a lightweight IntelliJ IDEA plugin for reading novels, browsing hot searches, and playing idle cultivation inside the IDE.
Fish Toucher 是一款轻量 IntelliJ IDEA 插件，可在 IDE 内阅读小说、浏览热搜和放置修仙。

  • Novel Reading / 小说阅读：Read text files in the status bar or tool window, with shared progress, charset detection, and configurable shortcuts.
    可在状态栏或工具窗口阅读文本文件，支持统一进度、编码识别和快捷键配置。
  • Hot Search / 热搜浏览：Browse trending topics from multiple sources, with auto refresh and one-click browser opening.
    浏览多来源热搜内容，支持自动刷新和点击打开浏览器。
  • Idle Cultivation / 放置修仙：Play a compact idle cultivation module with training, travel, abode, pills, techniques, breakthrough, and rebirth progression.
    体验轻量放置修仙模块，包含修炼、游历、洞府、丹药、功法、突破与转世成长。
  • Mode and Language / 模式与语言：Switch modes and plugin language from the tool window or settings. The language follows IDEA by default.
    可在工具窗口或设置中切换模式和插件语言，语言默认跟随 IDEA。

Settings / 设置路径： Settings → Tools → Fish Toucher

By installing this plugin, you agree to the End User License Agreement.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
3.0.0
  • New: Added Idle Cultivation module with training, travel, abode, pills, techniques, breakthrough, and rebirth progression.
    新增：放置修仙模块，包含修炼、游历、洞府、丹药、功法、突破与转世成长。
  • New: Added plugin language setting. The UI follows IDEA by default and can also be switched manually in settings or the tool window.
    新增：插件语言设置，默认跟随 IDEA，也可在配置页或工具窗口手动切换。
2.8.0
  • New: Added abode building for Idle Cultivation, including spirit-stone upgrades, timed stone and pill production, and new status bar claim reminders
    新增：放置修仙加入洞府建设，支持灵石升级、定时灵石和丹药产出，以及状态栏可领取提示
  • Changed: Closed-door cultivation and meditation now focus on qi; spirit stones are centered on travel rewards and abode production
    调整：闭关与吐纳专注修为收益，灵石经济转向游历奖励与洞府产出
2.7.0
  • New: Expanded Idle Cultivation with techniques, pills, timed travel, and a tabbed tool window
    新增：丰富放置修仙玩法，加入功法、丹药、倒计时游历与标签页工具窗口
2.6.0
  • New: Idle Cultivation mode with tool window panel, status bar progress, offline gains, meditation, and breakthrough attempts
    新增：放置修仙模式，支持工具窗口、状态栏进度、离线收益、吐纳与突破
2.5.0
  • Improved: Added recent reading history management
    优化：增加最近阅读记录管理。
2.4.1
  • Fixed: some issues
    修复：若干问题
2.4.0
  • New: Mode switch dropdown fixed at the top of the tool window — switch between Novel Reading and Hot Search without opening settings
    新增：工具窗口顶部模式切换下拉框
2.3.1
  • Fixed: Switching between novel and hot search mode now correctly updates tool window content without restart
    修复：切换小说/热搜模式后工具窗口内容立即更新，无需重启
2.3.0
  • New: Added Google Trends and X Trends hot search sources
    新增：Google趋势、X趋势热搜源
  • Improved: HTTP requests use JVM proxy (IDEA proxy settings)
    优化：HTTP请求使用JVM代理配置（IDEA代理设置）
2.2.0
  • New: Added Douyin and Kuaishou hot search sources
    新增：抖音、快手热搜源
2.1.0
  • New: Configurable carousel interval and data refresh interval for hot search
    新增：热搜轮播间隔和数据刷新间隔可自定义
  • Improved: Tool window default position changed to right side
    优化：工具窗口默认位置改为右侧
2.0.1
  • New: Switch hot search source directly in tool window bottom bar
    新增：工具窗口底部可直接切换热搜来源
  • Fixed: Hot search list not displaying in tool window
    修复：工具窗口热搜列表不显示的问题
2.0.0
  • New: Hot Search Carousel mode — browse real-time hot search trends in the IDE
    新增：热搜轮播模式 — 在 IDE 中浏览实时热搜榜单
  • New: Multiple hot search sources — Baidu, Toutiao, Zhihu, switchable in settings
    新增：多热搜源支持 — 百度、今日头条、知乎，可在设置中切换
  • New: Click hot search titles to open in browser
    新增：点击热搜标题可在浏览器中打开
  • New: Hot search displayed in both tool window and status bar with carousel rotation
    新增：热搜同时显示在工具窗口和状态栏，自动轮播
  • Improved: New cute fish plugin icon
    优化：全新萌鱼插件图标
1.4.1
  • Changed: Stealth mode and Normal mode now share unified reading progress
    变更：隐秘模式与普通模式共用统一阅读进度
  • Improved: Existing dual-progress data automatically migrated to unified progress (keeps the further position)
    优化：已有的双进度数据自动迁移为统一进度（保留较远的阅读位置）
1.4.0
  • New: Two independent reading modes — Stealth Mode (status bar) and Normal Mode (tool window)
    新增：两种独立阅读模式 — 隐秘模式（状态栏）和普通模式（工具窗口）
  • New: Each mode has its own reading progress, chars per line, and lines per page settings
    新增：每种模式拥有独立的阅读进度、每行字数、每页行数配置
  • Improved: New bright orange fish into icon for better visibility
    优化：图标加入一条橙红色小鱼

action.description: Open a local novel text file
